# External Figure Attribution (Deck Integration)

This directory contains externally sourced figures used in technical-training decks.

## denk2004-pbio-fig1.jpg
- Source URL: https://cdn.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/blobs/65c5/524270/e8555fa5f4f3/pbio.0020329.g001.jpg
- Source article: Denk W, Horstmann H (2004), *PLOS Biology*, "Serial Block-Face Scanning Electron Microscopy to Reconstruct Three-Dimensional Tissue Nanostructure."
- Article URL: https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.0020329
- License: Creative Commons Attribution (PLOS open access).

- License: Public domain (per Wikimedia file metadata).
